description: This file defines a JwtService class responsible for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT) within a Spring Boot application. It manages token issuance, claims parsing, and validation, using a configured secret key and properties.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service class for generating and validating JWT tokens, with internal key management and token claim handling.

methods.name: JwtService
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the JwtService with properties, validates the secret, and sets up the signing key.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Creates a signed JWT token containing user information and roles, with configured expiration.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Validates and parses a JWT token, returning the claims payload.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user UUID from the JWT claims.
